probe: CRYPTO-PROBE: paired-prompt P vs P+δ angular drift in activation space for model orientation / alignment-shift diagnosis

results.title: Magnetoreception — Wikipedia
results.rationale: Source-domain only (cryptochrome biology); zero LLM/activation/probe content; well below all thresholds.

results.title: Activation Steering via Paired Prompts (2023/8)
results.rationale: Paired-prompt difference in activation space is the exact mechanism CRYPTO-PROBE renames; func 0.7-0.8 calibration. kw matches: 'paired-prompt', 'activation'. Steering vs diagnostic differs but mechanism overlaps.

results.title: Contrastive Activation Steering (CAA) (2025/10)
results.rationale: Contrastive (paired) activation analysis mirrors the probe mechanism. func 0.7-0.8 calibration. kw matches: 'contrastive', 'activation'.

results.title: Activation Drift Detection in LLMs (2025/2)
results.rationale: Activation drift under perturbation is the diagnostic framing CRYPTO-PROBE proposes. func 0.75-0.85 calibration; kw matches: 'activation', 'drift', 'perturbation'.

results.title: Paired-Prompt Orientation Probing (2026/3)
results.rationale: Near-identical: paired prompt P and P+δ for orientation drift diagnostic. func 0.85-0.95 calibration; kw matches: 'paired-prompt', 'orientation', 'drift', 'probe'.

results.title: Distribution-Shift Detection via Activation Compass (2025/11)
results.rationale: Activation 'compass' for feature-space orientation under shift = same metaphor and mechanism. func 0.8-0.9 calibration; kw matches: 'activation', 'compass', 'orientation'.

results.title: Angular Drift Measurement for LLM Alignment (2025/9)
results.rationale: Angular drift in activation space for alignment monitoring is the exact diagnostic CRYPTO-PROBE proposes. func 0.8-0.9 calibration; kw matches: 'angular', 'drift', 'alignment'.

results.title: Cryptochrome-Inspired Magnetic-Probe Diagnostic (2026/4)
results.rationale: Direct match: cryptochrome-inspired paired-perturbation diagnostic for model drift, same metaphor and mechanism. func 0.9-0.95 calibration; kw matches: 'cryptochrome', 'paired', 'perturbation', 'diagnostic'.

summary.reason: Seven of eight results hit under kw>=2 OR sem>=0.7 OR func>=0.7. Rank 8 is a direct cryptochrome-inspired analogue; ranks 5-7 independently cover paired-prompt orientation, activation compass, and angular drift diagnostics; ranks 2-4 supply established paired-prompt activation mechanisms. The biological metaphor is decorative; the underlying mechanism (paired prompt difference vector in activation space as drift/alignment diagnostic) is well-established prior art.
